summary: The source contract limits both destination coordinates to 15, so every result has at most 30 characters and the legal path-length domain is too small for an honest runtime scaling verdict.

workload_bound.source_constraint: row and column are each integers from 1 through 15

replacement_checks.evidence: The reference performs at most 30 unranking decisions with binomial coefficients over at most 29 remaining moves and emits exactly r+c characters.
Regression exhausts every rank for all grids through 4 by 4 against independently enumerated paths and checks both extreme ranks at the 15 by 15 boundary.
